Software Development Engineer

Professional Summary

Backend Developer with 5+ years of experience specializing in Golang, building scalable web applications and microservices. Proficient in REST/GraphQL APIs, SQL/NoSQL databases, and containerization. Frontend skills with React and Next.js. Proven track record in healthcare and retail systems.

Technical Skills

Languages: Go, Python, JavaScript/TypeScript, Node.js, Dart
Databases: SQL, MongoDB, Redis
Architecture: REST API, GraphQL, gRPC, Microservices
Tools: AI Tools
